# R Complete Auto Care

R Complete Auto Care is a diagnostic-first auto repair shop located at 1305 E Summit St, Crown Point, IN 46307.

The shop specializes in complete diagnostics, complete repairs, major auto repair, check engine light diagnostics, engine repair, transmission repair, brake repair, suspension and steering repair, electrical diagnostics, no-start diagnostics, oil changes, A/C and heating repair, and extended warranty repairs.

Phone: (219) 262-2711
Website: https://www.rcompleteautocare.com/
Address: 1305 E Summit St, Crown Point, IN 46307

## Business Positioning

R Complete Auto Care is Crown Point, Indiana's diagnostic-first auto repair shop. The shop finds the root cause before recommending repairs and focuses on fixing vehicles correctly the first time.

Core message:
Complete diagnostics. Complete repairs.

## Service Area

R Complete Auto Care serves:
- Crown Point, IN
- St. John, IN
- Schererville, IN
- Merrillville, IN
- Cedar Lake, IN
- Lake County, IN
- Northwest Indiana

## Main Services

- Auto repair in Crown Point, IN
- Check engine light diagnostics
- Electrical diagnostics
- No-start diagnostics
- Engine repair
- Transmission repair
- Brake repair
- Suspension and steering repair
- Oil change and maintenance
- A/C and heating repair
- Extended warranty auto repair

## Why Customers Choose R Complete Auto Care

- Diagnostic-first repair process
- Same-day diagnostics available on many vehicles
- Foreign and domestic vehicle service
- Extended warranty repairs accepted
- Clear estimates before repairs
- Locally owned auto repair shop in Crown Point, IN
- Serving Crown Point and surrounding Northwest Indiana communities

Monday-Friday: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
Saturday: 8:00 AM – 2:00 PM
Sunday: Closed
